extension.summary: Sauvegarde et migration Kodi (simple ou complète)
Backup and migrate Kodi (simple or full)
extension.description: Addon universel de migration Kodi : sauvegarde/restauration de addon_data (simple) ou de userdata + addons (complète). Compatible Android 11+ via SAF.
Universal Kodi migration addon: backup/restore addon_data (simple) or userdata + addons (full). Android 11+ compatible via SAF.
